title: carduncellus pinnatus var. acaulis
intro: Carduncellus pinnatus var. acaulis, also known as leafless cardoon, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the thistle family and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. It is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving digestive health, as well as having potential anti-cancer properties. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in some culinary dishes for its edible stalks and flowers.
